content: Astro's only reserved directory is src/pages/ (file-based routing). Convention places reusable UI in src/components/, shared page shells with <slot/> in src/layouts/, collection configs in src/content.config.ts with entries under src/content/<name>/, and design tokens/global CSS in src/styles/. Structure is a convention, not enforced by the framework, so it can be tailored to project size.
